creator: kenrap@kennethraplee.com
text:
Sure, I'll also provide the output of creating the devuan jail prior to using ldd(1) inside it, just in case if it helps too.


root@freebsd [/usr/jails/devuan] # jail -cmf conf 
devuan: created
Using makefile-style concurrent boot in runlevel 3.
Enabling additional executable binary formats: binfmt-supportmount: /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc: mount point is not a directory.
       dmesg(1) may have more information after failed mount system call.
update-binfmts: warning: Couldn't mount the binfmt_misc filesystem on /proc/sys/fs/binfmt_misc.
.
dmesg: read kernel buffer failed: Operation not permitted
Starting enhanced syslogd: rsyslogdmknod: /dev/xconsole: Operation not supported
chown: cannot access '/dev/xconsole': No such file or directory
rsyslogd: cannot create '/dev/log': Operation not supported [v8.2302.0 try https://www.rsyslog.com/e/2176 ]
rsyslogd: imuxsock does not run because we could not acquire any socket  [v8.2302.0]
rsyslogd: activation of module imuxsock failed [v8.2302.0]
rsyslogd: imklog: cannot open kernel log (/proc/kmsg): No such file or directory.
rsyslogd: activation of module imklog failed [v8.2302.0 try https://www.rsyslog.com/e/2145 ]
.
Starting periodic command scheduler: cron.
Can't start system message bus - /proc is not mounted ... failed!
Starting session management daemon: elogind.
root@freebsd [/usr/jails/devuan] # jexec devuan /bin/sh  
# ldd /opt/brave.com/brave/brave
